pageIntro: Flat fees. Defined scope. Pick what fits where you are.

items.name: Second Opinion
items.description: A single 90-minute call. You walk me through your plan, I give you my honest read, and you get a write-up after to share with the team.

items.name: Category Read
items.description: I look at two categories: yours, and one that seems unrelated but runs on the same customer behavior underneath. From yours, I find the opening worth taking. From the other, I pull what's already working that you can borrow. You get a short write-up and a call to walk through both.

items.name: Unstuck
items.description: You're stuck and need fresh eyes. Send me what you've got, we talk it through so I get the real context, and I come back in writing with where it's caught and where I'd take it next.

items.name: Workshop
items.description: A working session built for your team's specific problem — not an off-the-shelf one I run for everyone. I design it from twelve years of my own material: the frameworks, the exercises, the real brand work, shaped around whatever you're actually stuck on. Your team works through real briefs in the room and keeps the whole thing afterward.

items.name: Monthly Retainer
items.description: A monthly setup that keeps me available to your team without booking a full project every time. You get a set amount of access: a few brief reviews a month, one strategy session, and gut-checks over email or Slack whenever something comes up. You're paying for the access, not the hours.
